name: obsidian-toolkit
description: Obsidian vault workflow skills: turn the vault into the natural home for durable, human-facing documentation. feedback-sweep (Figma/FigJam review → classified, routed, answered register), obsidian-kanban (Bases task board: digest, create/move cards, triage inbox, promote backlog items), obsidian-capture (promote durable decisions/specs/research/meeting-notes into the right vault folder), and obsidian-setup (wire a vault to Claude Code via Local REST API + MCP, or via git/Obsidian Git when Claude runs in the cloud). Vault-agnostic process; per-project config.
